active_parameter_count_definition: materialized GPT parameters; never substitute latent trainable count
eg_flops_accounting: EGTime is primary. EG_FLOPs must include BlockFHT decode/materialization, cache prepare/flush, and generated-weight gradient mapping, or be labelled nominal.
eval_batch_shape_policy: shared b16 evaluation independent of rung training microbatch; ordered fixed train/val windows and token budget must match across all rungs
fixed_eval_index_runtime_digest: record train.py rng_eval_metadata.fixed_eval_indices_sha256 before launch; all four rungs and their baseline/candidate pairs must match
instability_policy: hard reject NaN, Inf, divergence, or failed terminal evaluation
ladder_interpretation: initial descriptive four-rung, one-20TPP matched-size ladder only
practical_equivalence_policy: record the preregistered NLL band before launch; promote every tied/close recipe to 5TPP confirmation rather than silently choosing one
prelaunch_provenance_requirements: record source hashes, resolved config SHA256, data manifest SHA256, and runtime fixed-evaluation index digest
schedule_rounding: ceil(planned_tokens / tokens_per_iter); lr decay and terminal eval occur at max_iters
selection_endpoint: terminal held-out NLL on fixed eval windows
terminal_eval_protocol: evaluate at max_iters even when it is off periodic cadence
